summary: Tested Edge TTS voice support for VoxiDub. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). GET /api/edge-voices returns 322 voices across 75 languages. POST /api/edge-tts-preview works for all tested voices. Frontend: TTS Tool and Voice Replace Tool both default to 'dara' (Piseth) voice. Voice search and selection working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/edge-voices returns 200
GET /api/edge-voices has total_voices field (322 voices)
GET /api/edge-voices has total_languages field (75 languages)
GET /api/edge-voices has languages array
Khmer (km) is first language in list
Khmer has Piseth (km-KH-PisethNeural) voice
Khmer has Sreymom (km-KH-SreymomNeural) voice
Language structure is correct (code, male, female arrays)
Voice structure is correct (id, name, voice fields)
POST /api/edge-tts-preview with English voice returns MP3
POST /api/edge-tts-preview with Khmer Piseth voice returns MP3
POST /api/edge-tts-preview with Khmer Sreymom voice returns MP3
POST /api/edge-tts-preview with Japanese voice returns MP3
POST /api/edge-tts-preview with invalid voice returns 500
Login works with test credentials
TTS with dara voice returns audio
TTS with sophea voice returns audio
TTS with full Edge TTS voice name (en-US-GuyNeural) returns audio
TTS Tool default voice is 'dara' (Piseth)
Voice Replace Tool default voice is 'dara' (Piseth)
Voice options include Meta AI, Piseth, Sreymom, and all Edge TTS voices
TTS generation works and audio player appears
Tools page loads correctly with all tools visible
critical_code_review_comments: Voice search filter returns empty array when searching 'English' or 'Japanese' - the filter logic may need adjustment to match language names in the label text
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edge TTS voice support fully tested. Backend endpoints /api/edge-voices and /api/edge-tts-preview working correctly. Default voices changed from mms_khmer to dara (Piseth) for male and sophea (Sreymom) for female. TTS Tool and Voice Replace Tool in ToolsPage.jsx fetch voices from API and default to 'dara'. VoicePickerModal.jsx fetches from /api/edge-voices and supports preview via /api/edge-tts-preview. Note: Voice search filter in ToolsPage may need adjustment - searching 'English' returns empty results because the filter checks label text which uses locale format (en-AU) not language name.
